episode.title: Koko and Boingy 🐸 Boingy's Rainy Song | English Bedtime Story | Koko's Forest Adventure

email.subject: Rain, friendship, and three easy English words for this week
email.previewText: Sing, share, and rain with Koko and Boingy, then try a simple rainy-day family activity. 親子一起用溫柔的小活動練習分享與快樂。
email.heroTitle: This Week in Koko's Forest: Boingy's Rainy Song
email.richTextBody:
Koko's Forest - EP005

This Week in Koko's Forest: Boingy's Rainy Song

In this sweet forest story, Boingy loves to sing in the rain, but he feels lonely when no one joins him at first. Koko listens, brings a leaf umbrella, and turns a quiet rainy moment into a joyful game with friends. It is a lovely story for talking about sharing happiness, inviting others in, and finding fun on a rainy day.

Learning words
rain - rayn
water that falls from the clouds
Boingy sings a happy song in the rain.

share - shair
to let someone enjoy something with you
Koko helps Boingy share the fun with friends.

sing - sing
to make music with your voice
The forest animals sing together in the rain.

Parent activity
After watching, pretend it is a rainy day at home. Ask your child to open an imaginary leaf umbrella, sing one short line together, and name one way to share joy with a friend or sibling. Then say the three words together: rain, share, sing. Parent support: 看完後可以陪孩子玩一個下雨天想像遊戲，假裝撐起葉子雨傘，一起唱一句簡單旋律，再請孩子說說可以怎麼把快樂分享給朋友或手足。這樣能自然練習單字，也能延伸到同理心與分享。

Watch Boingy's Rainy Song with Koko
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NsihhZepBz4

Visit Fursay for more gentle bilingual learning ideas
https://fursay.com/koko?subscribe=koko&utm_source=creator_kit&utm_medium=description&utm_campaign=koko_story_funnel&utm_content=creator_kit_sample

Koko's Forest Adventure weekly pack is ready for family story time: https://fursay.com/creator/koko/newsletter
https://fursay.com/creator/koko/newsletter

Thank you for spending another cozy story time with Koko's Forest. We hope this week's rainy song brings your family a simple moment to sing, share, and enjoy being together.

editorBlocks.name: Footer QA
editorBlocks.action: Before scheduling, preview the campaign footer and fail closed if it still says Add your company postal address here or any other default placeholder.

browser.failureCommand: node scripts/newsletter-runner.mjs --mode chrome-result --channel koko --input content/newsletters/pending/1781482568937-8b290g-koko-ep005.newsletter.json --browser-status failed --failure-code <login_required|ui_changed|group_missing|subscriber_empty|schedule_blocked|unknown> --failure-detail "<exact blocker>"

checks: latest matching Gmail message exists after the scheduled send slot
message body does not contain Add your company postal address here, TODO, placeholder, or lorem ipsum
message body includes a YouTube CTA link
message did not collapse into a single plain-text paragraph
